summary: Promotion Display + Affiliate Attribution Correctness - All features verified working. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
seed_data_creation: None - test data cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All promotion display and affiliate attribution features verified: 1) POST /api/admin/promotions without discount fields creates promotion with discount_type='policy_driven', discount_value=0. 2) POST /api/admin/affiliates creates affiliate with auto-commission from settings. 3) Promotions Manager table shows 'Auto (policy)' for policy-driven promotions. 4) Affiliates table shows 'From settings' in commission column. 5) Promotion form has no discount_type/discount_value inputs - shows 'Discount is automatically calculated based on pricing policy settings'. 6) Affiliate form has no commission inputs - shows 'Automatically managed by system settings'. 7) Attribution helper captures ?aff=, ?affiliate=, ?ref= URL parameters and persists to localStorage.

details: POST /api/admin/promotions with {name, code, scope, stacking_rule} succeeds
discount_type defaults to 'policy_driven'
discount_value defaults to 0
Backend validation passes without discount fields
Policy-driven promotions show 'Auto (policy)' in discount column
Percentage promotions show 'X%'
Fixed amount promotions show 'TZS X'
No discount_type input field in form
No discount_value input field in form
Form shows 'Discount is automatically calculated based on pricing policy settings'
POST /api/admin/affiliates with identity + payout fields only succeeds
Commission auto-fetched from affiliate_settings
commission_type and commission_value set by backend
Commission column shows 'From settings' for all affiliates
No percentage values displayed in commission column
No commission_type input field in form
No commission_value input field in form
Form shows 'Automatically managed by system settings'
?aff= URL parameter captured and persisted to localStorage
?affiliate= URL parameter captured
?ref= URL parameter captured
bootstrapAffiliateAttribution() works on app load
CheckoutPage.jsx has 'Affiliate offer applied' banner with emerald (green) styling
Banner shows when detectedAffiliate.has_attribution is true
Banner displays affiliate name or code
